title: Unary minus should not be applied to an unsigned expression
description: Unary minus should not be applied to an unsigned expressionAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugbased-on-misraWhy is this an issue?More InfoApplying the unary minus operator to an unsigned variable or expression will always yield another unsigned expression. More plainly, in some cases the operation itself is meaningless, and in some other cases the result will be unexpected. In all cases it is bad practice.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Unary minus should not be applied to an unsigned expression. Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
